title: sanamunda
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", sanamunda (also known as Sida cordifolia) benefits include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and hypoglycaemic activities.
side_effects: Sanamunda can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Ingestion of the plant's extract can also cause headaches, fever, and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Furthermore, excessive consumption of sanamunda can lead to kidney damage and increased blood pressure, making it essential to follow recommended dosages and consult a healthcare professional. Improper use of the plant can also interact with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
